rmk:
In-band SNR 54dB (25-60kHz).

XC817763 and XC_817761 were made simultaneously, with the recorders and mics mounted on the same tripod and where the mics were similarly directed.

The difference in SNR between AudioMoth 1.2.0 with internal mics and Tascam dr100 mk3 with external mics is here 9dB.

A number of comparative recording pairs are gathered in the recording set:

[AudioMoth 1.2.0 with internal mics versus Tascam dr100 mk3 with external mics III (ultrasonic)](https://xeno-canto.org/set/8566).

[https://artportalen.se/Image/4845926](https://artportalen.se/Image/4845926)
